name: Cottage Pudding I
recipeInstructions:
This is a very simple dessert. Serve it warm with custard sauce or whipped cream.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift together dry ingredients.
Cream butter and sugar until light, beat in egg. Mix vanilla and milk. Add flour and milk alternately to egg mixture. Spoon into a buttered 8-by-8-inch baking pan and bake for 50 minutes. Cut into squares.
